ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, inactive, acquired) */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "founders" (
  "founder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each founder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the founder */,
  "background" TEXT /* Background of the founder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the founder within the company */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Relevant experience of the founder */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education background of the founder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("founder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_founders" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "founder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the founder */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the founder and the company (e.g., co-founder, CEO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "founder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_categories" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that received funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of funding */,
  "investor" TEXT /* Investor that provided funding */,
  "funding_round" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., seed, series A, series B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_investor FOREIGN KEY ("investor") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., VC, Angel, Private Equity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_companies" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, entrepreneur, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_companies" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the user and the company (e.g., founder, employee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entrepreneurial_ventures" (
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entrepreneurial venture */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "founder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the founder */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "venture_date" TEXT /* Date when the venture was started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entrepreneurial_ventures_founder_id FOREIGN KEY ("founder_id") REFERENCES founders ("founder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entrepreneurial_ventures_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venture_funding" (
  "venture_funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venture funding event */,
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding event */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venture_funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venture_funding_venture_id FOREIGN KEY ("venture_id") REFERENCES entrepreneurial_ventures ("venture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venture_funding_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venture_investors" (
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venture_id", "investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venture_categories" (
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venture_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research publication */,
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_publications_venture_id FOREIGN KEY ("venture_id") REFERENCES entrepreneurial_ventures ("venture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venture_metrics" (
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., revenue, user acquisition) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venture_id", "metric_name", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "venture_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venture_news_venture_id FOREIGN KEY ("venture_id") REFERENCES entrepreneurial_ventures ("venture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venture_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "venture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneurial venture */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venture_events_venture_id FOREIGN KEY ("venture_id") REFERENCES entrepreneurial_ventures ("venture_id")
)
